pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Java source and target compatibility from 1.8 to 21 to support the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation failure on JDK 21 if source/target remains 1.8, or inability to use JDK 21 language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot from 2.6.0 to 3.5.5 to align with Jakarta EE 9+ and JDK 21 requirements.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 2.x does not support Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.* instead of javax.*), causing runtime ClassNotFoundExceptions or compile errors when using modern dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet-api with jakarta.servlet-api to comply with the namespace migration in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: javax.servlet classes are removed in Jakarta EE 9+; code referencing javax.servlet will fail to compile or run.

spring-base-csrf/src/main/resources/META.general_idea: Update the fully qualified class name in spring.factories to reflect the package rebranding from org.gy to io.github.guanyang.
spring-base-csrf/src/main/resources/META.why_exists: Spring Boot will fail to load the auto-configuration class at runtime because the old package path no longer exists, resulting in a ClassNotFoundException or silent failure to apply CSRF configuration.

spring-base-util/pom.xml.general_idea: Migrate servlet API dependency from Java EE (javax) to Jakarta EE (jakarta) to support Spring Boot 3.x and JDK 21.
spring-base-util/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Jakarta EE 9+ APIs; using javax.servlet causes ClassNotFoundException or NoSuchMethodError at runtime.
